parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant TaskExecutionStrategy #GreenYellow
participant Action #GreenYellow
participant Connection #E6E6FA
boundary "SSH client/server connection" as SSH_conn
control "ssh daemon (or winrm service)" as ssh_daemon

TaskExecutionStrategy -> Action : init(..)
TaskExecutionStrategy -> Action : init(..)
TaskExecutionStrategy -> Action : run()
Action -> Connection : put_file()
Connection -> SSH_conn : transfer module data
SSH_conn -> ssh_daemon
ssh_daemon -> ssh_daemon : save module to disk
ssh_daemon --> SSH_conn
SSH_conn --> Connection : transfer complete
Connection --> Action : return remote path
Action -> Connection : exec_command()
Connection -> SSH_conn : run module remotely
SSH_conn -> ssh_daemon
ssh_daemon -> ssh_daemon : execute shell command
ssh_daemon --> SSH_conn
SSH_conn --> Connection : return response code, stdout, stderr
Connection --> Action : return response code, stdout, stderr
Action --> TaskExecutionStrategy : return JSON
@enduml
```
